narrative.overview: A bright, authored portfolio surface that feels personal, calm, and quietly assured. The design should present work samples like artifacts spread across a designer's desk, with warm typography and selective project color.

projectCard.description: Large case-study image with overlapping summary card and accent-reactive hover state.

dos: Use the project accent system selectively, not as a page-wide wash.
Keep display serif usage scarce and intentional.
Preserve the paper-and-artifact feel through light backgrounds and soft shadows.
donts: Do not drift into generic SaaS marketing patterns.
Do not introduce cold enterprise styling.
Do not prioritize animation tricks over readability.
